recommended_config.description: Ternarise v_proj in layers 19-21 only (3 layers). Estimated +4.1% gap on full WikiText-2.

validated_config.description: Ternarise v_proj in layers 18-21 (4 layers). Full-dataset validation.

findings.reason: Per-layer sensitivity analysis identifies individually low-impact layers, but compound errors across multiple ternary layers dominate. Protecting top-9 sensitive layers leaves 145 ternary layers that collectively produce PPL 78,155 (vs FP32 7.19).
findings.compound_error_knee: Between 3-4 v_proj layers (late blocks). Adding o_proj layers causes catastrophic compound errors.
findings.compression_at_target_quality: 1.00x (negligible). Only 3-4 tiny v_proj layers (524K params each, 0.14-0.19% of 1.1B total) can be ternarised within <5% quality target.
